name: Amélie
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A first-floor one-bedroom residence in the stone village heart of Green Coast, Palasë.
description: A first-floor one-bedroom residence in the stone village heart of Green Coast, Palasë — over 98 square metres gross, generously scaled for its type. Set moments above the central plaza, it pairs a calm, well-proportioned interior with the resort's promenades, pools and the Blue Flag beach below.
highlights: Centre-west of the village, above the parking entrance
98.23 m² gross · generously scaled for a one-bedroom
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Amélie sits at the centre-west of the village, directly above in the quarter. The central plaza is a short, level walk east, the hotel and its services just beyond, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
